---
title: "Jam Weekend Agenda"
---

We'lll meet in CAD lecture hall, and will have use of various studio space within CAD over the weekend.

| Time | Activity |
|------|----------|
| **Saturday, March 22** ||
| 10:00 – 10:30 | Introductions, icebreaker, project overview & group formation |
| 10:30 – 11:30 | Mini-lectures & demo: dance blocks and algorithmic concepts |
| 11:30 – 12:00 | Begin brainstorming: mapping dance to algorithms |
| 12:00 – 1:00 | Lunch |
| 1:00 – 3:00 | Collaborative exploration: testing ideas and developing concepts |
| **Sunday, March 23** ||
| 9:30 – 11:00 | Dancers: studio rehearsal & movement development |
| 10:00 – 12:00 | CS students: programming & algorithm exploration |
| 12:00 – 1:00 | Lunch |
| 1:00 – 3:00 | Full teams reunite: collaborative work, refinement & filming |
